description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for linting and testing a Scala client. The workflow should trigger on pull requests to master and release branches, and on workflow dispatch. It consists of three jobs: check_format, build_server, and test. The check_format job checks code format with sbt, the build_server job builds the server, and the test job runs Scala client tests with a matrix of Java versions 8, 11, and 17.
